description: MEX1 Inverter 2 dead: reports ONLINE but 0 W while its two siblings produce ~79 kW. Real data from the 2026-07-02 11:00:30 MX telemetry sample. This is the case a status-only offline check would miss and inverter_relative must catch. All three MEX1 inverters are 150 kW (homogeneous), so normalization does not change the verdict.
